privileged_info_summary: The task operates on real PDB data for the GroEL-GroES complex (1AON), downloaded from the RCSB PDB. Programmatic verification confirmed that the actual internal diameter of the cis ring (Residue 261 CA, Chain A to D) is approximately 75.69 Å, correctly falling into the 70-95 Å verifier bounds. The trans ring diameter (Residue 261 CA, Chain H to K) is approximately 47.06 Å, correctly falling into the 35-60 Å bounds. The relevant apical domain amino acid is Threonine (THR). All output paths and file size constraints exactly match the export and verifier scripts.
